commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Let her not be as one dead, whose flesh is half consumed when he comes out of his mother's womb. Dead; consumed by leprosy, or incapable of performing the duties of life. (Menochius) Hebrew, "an abortive, whose flesh is half consumed before he comes forth from his mother's womb. "Septuagint, "he eateth half her flesh. "Permit not her to be separated from us, I beseech you, for she is our sister: pray, I beg, that her flesh may be healed "Chaldean.
